commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=73c0f7045adc4d88f5924de25f6a784452edda00)
commands.review_summary:
The PR forwards the configured memorySearch provider id into the Ollama memory embedding adapter and gateway memory adapter path, and adds an adapter regression test for a custom Ollama baseUrl.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +34. Total +36 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.6.10 hard-code or omit the custom provider id on the affected Ollama adapter and gateway memory-adapter paths, and the PR body includes terminal before/after HTTP proof for the endpoint routing behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused repair can add resolved baseUrl to Ollama memory cacheKeyData and test distinct endpoints without product judgment.

target.title: fix(ollama): preserve custom provider id through memory embedding adapter (#96742)
target.body:
## Summary

When a custom Ollama provider is defined under `models.providers` with `api: "ollama"` and a custom `baseUrl`, and used as `memorySearch.provider`, the memory engine resolves the custom provider ID back to the base `ollama` plugin's default baseUrl instead of the custom one.

**Root cause**: In `ollamaMemoryEmbeddingProviderAdapter.create()`, the `provider` parameter is hardcoded to `"ollama"`, overwriting the actual custom provider ID (e.g., `"ollama-proxy"`) that the caller correctly passes through. Downstream, `resolveConfiguredProvider()` uses `options.provider` to look up the provider config ŌĆö since it always sees `"ollama"`, it finds the base plugin config (no custom baseUrl) instead of the user's custom provider config.

**Two-layer fix**:
1. `extensions/ollama/src/memory-embedding-adapter.ts`: Replace hardcoded `provider: "ollama"` with `provider: options.provider ?? "ollama"` (same pattern as `openAiMemoryEmbeddingProviderAdapter`)
2. `src/gateway/embeddings-http.ts`: Add `provider: providerId` to `createWithAdapter`'s `adapter.create()` call, matching `createWithGenericAdapter` which already passes provider

Not modified: `resolveConfiguredProvider` fallback logic, cacheKeyData, runtime id labels, other embedding adapters (bedrock, openai-compatible).

## Real Behavior Proof

**Environment**: Real `node:http` server + real `fetch` (no vi.mock, no stubs) + real ollama Docker container on `localhost:11434` (serves as negative control target).

**Proof script**: `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-96742-evidence/proof-96742.mts`

**Execution**:
```
$ node --import tsx proof-96742.mts

=== NEGATIVE CONTROL (BEFORE FIX) ŌĆö adapter with provider="ollama" ===
Config has: ollama-proxy = { baseUrl: http://127.0.0.1:34567 }
Old code always passes: provider = "ollama"
ŌåÆ resolveConfiguredProvider("ollama", config) returns base plugin config
ŌåÆ No custom baseUrl found ŌåÆ resolves to default http://127.0.0.1:11434
ŌåÆ Local ollama server at :11434 will reject the request (wrong config)

Embedding call to localhost:11434 (old code path)...
Expected failure: Ollama embed HTTP 404: {"error":"model \"nomic-embed-text\" not found, try pulling it first"}
Negative control (wrong endpoint) triggered: YES Ō£ģ

=== AFTER FIX ===
Adapter called with provider: "ollama-proxy"
ŌåÆ resolveConfiguredProvider("ollama-proxy", config) finds the custom config
ŌåÆ baseUrl from custom config: http://127.0.0.1:34567

Executing actual adapter.create() with real HTTP...
Ō£ō Adapter.create() succeeded
Ō£ō embedQuery() succeeded, embedding length: 3

=== REQUEST VERIFICATION ===
Total requests received by custom server: 1
  Request: POST /api/embed
  Model:   nomic-embed-text
  Input:   "search_query: hello"

=== VERDICT ===
Server URL: http://127.0.0.1:34567
Actual endpoint: http://127.0.0.1:34567/api/embed
Custom baseUrl WAS honored: YES Ō£ģ
```

### Summary of Evidence

| Scenario | provider parameter | resolveConfiguredProvider looks up | baseUrl resolved | HTTP target | Result |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **BEFORE fix** (negative control) | `"ollama"` (hardcoded) | base plugin (ollama) | `http://127.0.0.1:11434` (default) | `http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/embed` | HTTP 404 (wrong server) ŌØī |
| **AFTER fix** | `"ollama-proxy"` (passed through) | custom config (ollama-proxy) | `http://127.0.0.1:34567` (custom) | `http://127.0.0.1:34567/api/embed` | Embedding received Ō£ģ |

**Untested**: Real ollama server with custom baseUrl in full openclaw deployment context (beyond adapter proof scope).

## Regression Test Plan

```bash
$ npx vitest run extensions/ollama/src/embedding-provider.test.ts
Ō£ō 26 passed (26)

$ npx vitest run src/gateway/embeddings-http.test.ts
Ō£ō 28 passed (28)

$ npx vitest run extensions/memory-core/src/memory/embeddings.test.ts
Ō£ō 7 passed (7)

$ node --import tsx /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-96742-evidence/proof-96742.mts
ALL PROOF CASES PASSED
```

All 61 tests + 1 live proof case pass. No other files modified.
target.author: maweibin

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
